UNIFIND Profile

Marco Carnevale is an Associate Professor in the Department of Industrial and Information Engineering at the University of Pavia. His official profile places him in the applied mechanics disciplinary sector.

The university teaching record associated with his profile includes Mechanics Applied to Machines, Machine Design, and Elements of Biorobotics. In RAMSLAB, these areas connect naturally to mechanical design, robotic systems, and human-oriented engineering applications.

Department
Department of Industrial and Information Engineering
ai.rams@unipv.it
